internal.content:
---
title: Cúram Learning Paths

description: Cúram Learning Paths
---

import { Link } from "gatsby";

Cúram offers different Learning Paths as a way for you to learn how to perform a certain job role, or acquire the knowledge for a particular skillset.

Our Learning Paths are comprised of courses (listed on the <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses">Available Courses</Link> page) that you take in a specific order, so that you build up the knowledge in an appropriate order and don't miss out on something that underpins a more advanced topic.

To review full details of the paths and courses contained, please download [Cúram_TrainingPaths_Courses.pdf](/pdf/education/Cúram_TrainingPaths_Courses.pdf)

## Developer Learning Paths

### Technical Fundamentals 8.X

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur087-introduction-to-the-merative-curam-platform-8.x:-functional-overview">
     Introduction to the Merative Cúram Platform 8.X: Functional Overview
   </Link>

2. <Link to="https://www.merative.com/curam">
     Social Program Management Success Stories
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur089-merative-curam-8.x-technical-overview">
     Merative Cúram 8.X Technical Overview
   </Link>

4. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur093-(dl41001g)-merative-spm-on-kubernetes-for-business-consultants">
     Cúram on Kubernetes for Business Consultants
   </Link>

5. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur110-introduction-to-curam-evidence">
     Introduction to Cúram Evidence
   </Link>

### V8.X Developer Certification

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur090-merative-curam-for-developers-(ade)-8.x">
     Merative Cúram for Developer (ADE) 8.X
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur091-merative-curam-for-developers-(customization)-8.x">
     Merative Cúram for Developers (Customization) 8.X
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur092-merative-curam-development-environment-8.x-for-developers:-sandbox">
     Merative Cúram Development Environment 8.X: Sandbox
   </Link>

4. <Link to="/spm/education/ade_certification_v8">
     Cúram V8.X ADE Accreditation
   </Link>

5. <Link to="/spm/education/dev_certification_v8">
     Cúram V8.X Customization Certification
   </Link>

6. <Link to="/spm/education/booking_tests">
     Booking Cúram 8.X Certification
   </Link>

### Specialized Developer - Citizen Engagement (Backend)

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur104-merative-curam-citizen-engagement-server-side-for-developers">
     Merative Cúram Citizen Engagement Server-Side for Developers
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur082-(9d82g)-ibm-curam-spm-intelligent-evidence-gathering-(ieg)-for-developers-7.x">
     Merative SPM Intelligent Evidence Gathering (IEG) for Developers
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/learning_paths#specialized-developer-rules-and-evidence">
     Specialized Developer - Rules and Evidence (below)
   </Link>

4. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur068-(9d68g)-merative-curam-developing-rest-apis">
     Merative Cúram - Developing REST APIs
   </Link>

### Citizen Engagement / Universal Access (Front End)

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur105-merative-curam-ghhs-web-design-system-for-designers">
     Merative Cúram GHHS Web Design System for Designers
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur080-(9d80g)-ibm-spm-design-system-for-developers">
     Merative SPM Design System for Developers
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur081-(9d81g)-ibm-universal-access-for-developers-(responsive-web-application)">
     Merative SPM Universal Access for Developers (Responsive Web Application)
   </Link>

### Specialized Developer - Rules and Evidence

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur110-introduction-to-curam-evidence">
     Merative Cúram Introduction to Evidence
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur111-merative-curam-evidence-for-developers">
     Merative Cúram Evidence for Developers
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur099-merative-curam-express-rules-for-developers-v8.x">
     Merative Cúram Express Rules for Developers 8.X
   </Link>

## Business User Learning Paths

### Cúram Functional User (Non-Certified) 8.X

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur087-introduction-to-the-merative-curam-platform-8.x:-functional-overview">
     Introduction to Merative Cúram Platform 8.X: Functional Overview
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur097-merative-curam-development-environment-8.x-for-bas:-sandbox">
     (optional) Cúram Development Environment 8.X for BAs: Sandbox
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur102-fundamentals-of-curam-financial-management">
     Fundamentals of Cúram Financial Management
   </Link>

4. <Link to="https://www.merative.com/curam">
     Social Program Management Success Stories
   </Link>

### Cúram Business Analyst 8.X (Certified)

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur088-fundamentals-of-the-merative-curam-platform-for-business-analysts-8.x">
     Fundamentals of the Merative Cúram Platform for Business Analyst 8.X
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/ba_certification_v8">
     Business Certification Advice
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur097-merative-curam-development-environment-8.x-for-bas:-sandbox">
     (optional) Cúram Development Environment 8.X for BAs: Sandbox
   </Link>

4. <Link to="/spm/education/booking_tests">
     Cúram 8.X Business Analyst Certification
   </Link>

### Specialized Cúram Business Analyst

1. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur105-merative-curam-ghhs-web-design-system-for-designers">
     Merative Cúram GHHS Web Design System for Designers
   </Link>

2. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur110-introduction-to-curam-evidence">
     Introduction to Cúram Evidence
   </Link>

3. <Link to="/spm/education/training_courses#cur093-(dl41001g)-curam-on-kubernetes-for-business-consultants">
     Cúram on Kubernetes for Business Consultants
   </Link>
